_meta.source: Försäkringskassan / Regeringen — fastställs varje år enligt Socialförsäkringsbalken (SFB) 2 kap 6-7§
_meta.description: Prisbasbelopp (PBB) and inkomstbasbelopp (IBB) per year. Used for calculating thresholds in Swedish law — inventarie limits, K10 salary basis, income ceilings etc.

usage.inventarie_threshold: Inventarier under halvt prisbasbelopp (PBB/2) may be expensed directly instead of capitalised — K2 rule (BFN). At 2026 PBB 58 800: threshold = 29 400 kr excl. VAT.
usage.k10_salary_basis: IBB used in K10 salary-based dividend calculation — see k10.md
usage.social_insurance_ceiling: 7.5 × PBB is the ceiling for sjukpenninggrundande inkomst (SGI)
